Class CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.couchbase.CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
CouchbaseSearchVectorStore
public static class CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder>
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Laurent Doguin, chabinhwang

    Configures the Couchbase scope, parent of the selected collection.
    CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder
    similarityFunction(CouchbaseSimilarityFunction similarityFunction)
    Choose the method to calculate the similarity between the vector embedding in a Vector Search index and the vector embedding in a Vector Search query.

    Configures the vector index name.

  • Method Details

    • initializeSchema

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • collectionName

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder collectionName(String collectionName)
      Configures the Couchbase collection storing Document.
      Parameters:
      collectionName -
      Returns:
      this builder

    • scopeName

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder scopeName(String scopeName)
      Configures the Couchbase scope, parent of the selected collection. Search will be executed in this scope context.
      Parameters:
      scopeName -
      Returns:
      this builder

    • bucketName

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder bucketName(String bucketName)
      Configures the Couchbase bucket, parent of the selected Scope.
      Parameters:
      bucketName -
      Returns:
      this builder

    • vectorIndexName

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder vectorIndexName(String vectorIndexName)
      Configures the vector index name. This must match the name of the Vector Search Index Name in Atlas
      Parameters:
      vectorIndexName -
      Returns:
      this builder

    • dimensions

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder dimensions(Integer dimensions)
      The number of dimensions in the vector.
      Parameters:
      dimensions -
      Returns:
      this builder

    • similarityFunction

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder similarityFunction(CouchbaseSimilarityFunction similarityFunction)
      Choose the method to calculate the similarity between the vector embedding in a Vector Search index and the vector embedding in a Vector Search query.
      Parameters:
      similarityFunction -
      Returns:
      this builder

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder indexOptimization(CouchbaseIndexOptimization indexOptimization)

      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public CouchbaseSearchVectorStore build()
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Builds and returns a new VectorStore instance with the configured settings.
      Returns:
